prose.en: Require the developer of the system, system component, or system service to implement an explicit process to continuously improve the development process.

guidance.en: Developers of systems, system components, and system services consider the effectiveness and efficiency of their development processes for meeting quality objectives and addressing the security and privacy capabilities in current threat environments.

prose.en: the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to implement an explicit process to continuously improve the development process.

objects.en: procedures addressing development process, standards, and tools
acquisition contracts for the system, system component, or system service
quality goals and metrics for improving the system development process
quality control reviews of system development process
plans of action and milestones for improving the system development process
Organizational personnel with system and service acquisition responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
